/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/SubFunctions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/globals.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/substitution_ciphers/affine_recurrent/AffineRecurrentCipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/substitution_ciphers/affine/AffineCipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/substitution_ciphers/SubstitutionCipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/substitution_ciphers/caesar/CaesarCipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/files_functions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/block_ciphers/BlockCipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/block_ciphers/hill_cipher/HillCipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/gamma_ciphers/vigenere_cipher/VigenereRepetitionGamma/VigenereRepetitionGamma.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/gamma_ciphers/vigenere_cipher/VigenereOpenTextGamma/VigenereOpenTextGamma.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/gamma_ciphers/vigenere_cipher/VigenereCipherTextGamma/VigenereCipherTextGamma.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/gamma_ciphers/vigenere_cipher/VigenereCipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/gamma_ciphers/VernameCipher/VernameCipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/gamma_ciphers/GammaCipher.cpp.o CMakeFiles/encoder_armadillo.dir/work_folder/block_ciphers/hill_recurrent/HillRecurrentCipher.cpp.o -o encoder_armadillo  -Wl,-rpath,"/Users/aidasardarova/Documents/HSE/A&P/encoder_AaP/build/_deps/armadillo-build" _deps/armadillo-build/libarmadillo.12.0.1.dylib -framework Accelerate /opt/homebrew/lib/libarpack.dylib
